title: AI Readiness Assessment
shortDescription: Assess organizational readiness and build a foundation for AI success

hero.headline: AI Readiness Assessment
hero.subheadline: Honest Assessment Before You Waste Money on AI Tools

problemSection.headline: Most Businesses Jump Straight to Tools
problemSection.copy: Without understanding your current state—people, processes, data, and culture—you'll implement AI solutions that look great in demos but deliver mediocre results.

keyStatistic.description: Because organizations didn't assess readiness first

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.description: At Madavi Advisory, we believe that AI readiness starts with honest assessment. Organizations that invest in understanding their current state—people, processes, data, and culture—are the ones that succeed with AI implementation.

values.title: Integrity First
values.description: We provide honest assessments without sugar-coating gaps. Real understanding leads to real solutions.

values.title: Excellence in Action
values.description: Our readiness framework is based on years of experience helping organizations transform through AI adoption.

values.title: True Partnership
values.description: We work with you to not just identify gaps, but build concrete plans to address them.

approach.title: Our Approach
approach.description: Our comprehensive AI Readiness Assessment evaluates your organization across four critical dimensions.

steps.title: People Readiness Assessment
steps.description: Evaluate leadership understanding, team skills, organizational alignment, and change readiness.

steps.title: Process Analysis
steps.description: Examine current workflows, identify AI opportunities, and assess process maturity.

steps.title: Data Evaluation
steps.description: Assess data quality, governance, infrastructure, and readiness for AI workloads.

steps.title: Cultural Assessment
steps.description: Evaluate organizational culture, change appetite, collaboration, and growth mindset.

faqs.question: Is this really free?
faqs.answer: Yes. Our 60-minute readiness audit costs nothing and requires no credit card. We charge only if you move forward with strategy or implementation services.

faqs.question: Why do you offer it for free?
faqs.answer: We believe every organization should understand their AI readiness before spending money. A free audit filters for serious organizations and builds trust. If we're the right partner, you'll want to work with us.

faqs.question: How long does the full audit take?
faqs.answer: The core interview is 60 minutes. We deliver a detailed report within 3 business days. If you want to move to strategy work, that typically takes 4-6 weeks.

faqs.question: What if we're not ready for AI?
faqs.answer: That's valuable information. We'll show you exactly what needs to happen first—whether that's data work, process improvements, team hiring, or culture change. We'll even give you a phased plan with timeline and resource needs.

seo.metaDescription: Evaluate your organization's AI readiness with our comprehensive assessment framework. Understand people, processes, data, and culture before implementing AI.
